questionHtml:
The concentration of methanoic acid was found by titration with a 0.200 mol dm−3 standard solution of sodium hydroxide, NaOH (aq), using an indicator to determine the end point.

Calculate the pH of the sodium hydroxide solution.
markschemeHtml:
«[OH−] = 0.200 mol dm−3»

ALTERNATIVE 1:
«pOH = −log10(0.200) =» 0.699 ✓
«pH = 14.000 − 0.699 =» 13.301 ✓

ALTERNATIVE 2:
«[H+] = 1.00x10-140.200 = » 5.00 × 10−14 «mol dm−3» ✓
«pH = −log10(5.00 × 10−14)» = 13.301 ✓

 

Award [2] for correct final answer.

meta.title: The concentration of methanoic acid was found by titration with a 0.200 mol dm−3 standard solution of sodium hydroxide, NaOH (aq), using an indicator to determine the end point. Ca
